headline: ₹0-10 Cr at risk — Adani Power pilots green ammonia blending at Mundra plant, signaling early decarbonization move in thermal generation.
what_matters: No current P/E effect; minor positive signal for long-term margin resilience.
Supports BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks; no new regulatory deadlines or penalties triggered.
No immediate cost of capital impact; potential for future bond spread tightening if scaled.
